output_payload.rendered_text:
# Creative Commons License Agreement

**Work Title:** My Digital Art
**Licensor:** Alice Corp
**License:** CC-BY-4.0
**Effective Date:** See execution hash timestamp

---

## Grant of Rights

Alice Corp (the "Licensor") grants you a worldwide, royalty-free license to the work titled "My Digital Art" under the terms of the CC-BY-4.0 license.

The full license text is available at: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

## Attribution

Attribution required per license terms.

## Disclaimer

This agreement records the Licensor's stated election of the above Creative Commons license. It does not constitute legal advice. The published Creative Commons license terms govern. Consult a licensed attorney for your jurisdiction.

output_payload.rendered_text:
# IP3 Rights Record

**Work:** Anthem Song
**Licensor:** Alice Corp
**Licensee:** Bob LLC
**License:** CC-BY-4.0
**Territory:** Worldwide
**Term:** 3 year(s)
**Effective Date:** See execution hash timestamp

---

## Rights Granted

Alice Corp grants Bob LLC a license to use the work "Anthem Song" under the CC-BY-4.0 terms for the territory of Worldwide for a period of 3 year(s).

## Royalty

As negotiated between parties.

## Renewal

No automatic renewal unless separately agreed.

## Disclaimer

This term sheet is a pre-approved template record only. It does not constitute legal advice and is not a binding contract without independent legal review. Consult a licensed attorney for your jurisdiction.
